ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the reservation */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the reservation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reservation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reservation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the reservation (e.g., confirmed, canceled) */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reservation was created */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reservation was last updated */,
  "reservation_type" TEXT /* Type of reservation (e.g., single day, multi-day, recurring) */,
  "guest_count" INTEGER /* Number of guests for the reservation */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room or facility reserved (e.g., standard room, suite, conference room) */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Any special requests or notes from the guest */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "booking_source" TEXT /* Source of the booking (e.g., website, call center) */,
  "confirmation_number" TEXT /* Unique confirmation number for the reservation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., guest, staff, admin) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code or postal code of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the property */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., hotel, conference center, event space) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the property */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available at the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the property */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Whether the property is available for booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservation_dates" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date entry */,
  "day" TEXT /* Specific date of the reservation */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reservation ID */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the date was created */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the date was last updated */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Whether the date is part of a recurring reservation */,
  "recurring_pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of recurrence (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservation_dates_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancellations" (
  "cancellation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation entry */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reservation that was canceled */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the cancellation was created */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the cancellation was last updated */,
  "cancellation_fee" TEXT /* Fee charged for the cancellation */,
  "cancellation_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who canceled the reservation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancellation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancellations_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancellations_cancellation_by FOREIGN KEY ("cancellation_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated reservation */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount charged for the reservation */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Reference number from the payment gateway */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "refunded_amount" TEXT /* Amount refunded, if any */,
  "refunded_date" TEXT /* Date and time the refund was processed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id")
)
